44px);left:50%;transform:translate(-50%, -50%);width:300px;z-index:1}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .pages-swiper-wrapper{display:flex;padding-left:0px;margin-top:0px;margin-bottom:0px}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .page-nav-button{border:0;top:calc(50% + 44px);transform:translateY(-50%);position:absolute;display:inline-block;width:42px;height:40px;cursor:pointer;background-size:cover;z-index:2}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .page-nav-button .page-nav-icon .st0{fill:none;stroke:#444545;stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-miterlimit:10}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .page-nav-button .page-nav-next-button{right:10px}}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .page-nav-prev-button{left:14px}@media(max-width: 480px){.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .page-nav-prev-button{left:10px}}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .focusable:focus{border:2px solid #2980b9}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .page-pagination{position:absolute;bottom:40px;right:40px}@media(max-width: 480px){.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .page-pagination{background-color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);padding:5px 10px;bottom:20px;right:20px}}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .left-scrubber-button-phone-wrapper{bottom:33px;left:30px;position:absolute}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container .left-scrubber-button-phone-wrapper .left-scrubber-phone-button{width:50px;height:50px;background-color:#34495e;display:inline-block;cursor:pointer}.pages-container .pages-swiper-container
